title: Socket-reliability thread: bidi-on-hardening + echo-mode wire tests + timeout->signal removals
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

3 phases. P1: rebase bidi #1129 onto hardened #1180, reconcile finalize-ack w/ #1174 -> branch feat/bidi-on-hardening (gives the completion back-channel). P2: audit ~116 timeout/sleep sites (datadir/timeout-audit.md) -> KEEP-deadline vs REPLACE-with-signal. P3 (blocked by P1+P2): fan out one branch+worker per REPLACE spot, swapping wait-and-hope timeouts for completion signals through the chain. Also: leverage echo_mode to exhaustively property-test/fuzz the wire protocol.
